regional_cost_note: Cabinet makers in Rotorua typically charge $1,600–$3,200/m run for custom kitchen cabinetry, $900–$2,700/m for custom wardrobes, and higher rates for commercial joinery. Rotorua rates are generally competitive — expect to pay near or slightly below the national average. Lead times for custom joinery are typically 8–14 weeks — factor this into your project schedule.
